quote: Stay committed to your decisions, but stay flexible in your approach.
author: Tony Robbins

quote: You were not born a winner, and you were not born a loser. You are what you make yourself to be.
author: Lou Holtz

quote: The world will ask you who you are, and if you do not know, the world will tell you.
author: Carl Jung

quote: Look for the good in every person and every situation. You'll almost always find it.
author: Brian Tracy

quote: Search for the seed of good in every adversity.
author: Og Mandino

quote: Strength does not come from winning. Your struggles develop your strengths.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

quote: The happiness of this life depends less on what befalls you than the way in which you take it.
author: Elbert Hubbard

quote: As you think, so shall you become.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: A weakness when understood can become a strength, but the overextension of a strength can become a weakness.
author: Unknown

quote: Make sure your worst enemy doesn't live between your two ears.
author: Laird Hamilton

quote: Follow your instincts. That's where true wisdom manifests itself.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: A head full of fears has no space for dreams.
author: Unknown

quote: When you see a person without a smile, give them one of yours.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: Don't just wait for inspiration. Become it.
author: Unknown

quote: Enjoy the little things, for one day you may look back and realize they were the big things.
author: Robert Brault

quote: Hardships often prepare ordinary people for an extraordinary destiny.
author: Unknown

quote: The master has failed more times than the beginner has even tried.
author: Stephen McCranie

quote: Don't let the behavior of others destroy your inner peace.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: You may not control all the events that happen to you, but you can decide not to be reduced by them.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: Worrying does not take away tomorrow's troubles, it takes away today's peace.
author: Unknown

quote: Find a place inside where there's joy, and the joy will burn out the pain.
author: Joseph Campbell

quote: Happiness is not something you postpone for the future; it is something you design for the present.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Do or do not, there is no try.
author: Yoda

quote: Things may come to those who wait, but only the things left by those who hustle.
author: Unknown

quote: Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Always do what you are afraid to do.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Never let success get to your head, and never let failure get to your heart.
author: Drake

quote: Always walk through life as if you have something new to learn and you will.
author: Vernon Howard

quote: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.
author: Jimmy Johnson

quote: Success is the ability to go from failure to failure without losing your enthusiasm.
author: Winston Churchill

quote: A goal is not always meant to be reached, it often serves simply as something to aim at.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: Look for something positive each day, even if some days you have to look a little harder.
author: Unknown

quote: Every morning we are born again. What we do today is what matters most.
author: Buddha

quote: It doesn't matter where you are, you are nowhere compared to where you can go.
author: Bob Proctor

quote: No matter how hard the past, you can always begin again.
author: Jack Kornfield

quote: Wanting to be someone else is a waste of who you are.
author: Anonymous

quote: Where you are is a result of who you were, but where you go depends entirely on who you choose to be.
author: Hal Elrod

quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Make each day your masterpiece.
author: John Wooden

quote: If you want your life to be a magnificent story, then begin by realising that you are the author.
author: Mark Houlahan

quote: In the midst of movement and chaos, keep stillness inside of you.
author: Deepak Chopra

quote: Do small things with great love.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: Don't sit down and wait for the opportunities to come. Get up and make them.
author: Madam C. J. Walker

quote: To accomplish great things, we must not only act, but also dream, not only plan, but also believe.
author: Anatole France

quote: Take care of your body. It's the only place you have to live.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: You are what you do, not what you say you'll do.
author: Carl Jung

quote: Those who can imagine anything can create the impossible.
author: Alan Turing

quote: Go beyond yourself rather than beyond others.
author: Unknown

quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good person should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Live in the present and make it so beautiful that it's worth remembering.
author: Arnold H. Glasow

quote: Don't bury your failures. Let them inspire you.
author: Unknown

quote: Ask yourself, who do you want to be? Figure out for yourself what makes you happy, no matter how crazy it may sound to other people.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

quote: Yesterday, you said tomorrow.
author: Nike

quote: If you stumble make it part of the dance.
author: Unknown

quote: The only thing standing between you and your goal is the story you keep telling yourself as to why you can't achieve it.
author: Jordan Belfort

quote: Never overlook the power of simplicity.
author: Robin S. Sharma

quote: Excuses are the rocks where our dreams are crushed.
author: Tim Fargo

quote: Acknowledging the good that you already have in your life is the foundation for all abundance.
author: Eckhart Tolle

quote: Success is achieved by developing our strengths, not by eliminating our weaknesses.
author: Marilyn vos Savant

quote: If you can be anything in this world, be kind.
author: Caroline Flack

quote: Deciding what not to do is as important as deciding what to do.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Choose a job you love and you will never have to work a day of your life.
author: Unknown

quote: Aim above morality. Be not simply good, be good for something.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Experience is simply the name we give our mistakes.
author: Oscar Wilde

quote: Whatever your goal in life, unless you develop a great urgency, what could be near will be far away.
author: Sadhguru

quote: What you do makes a difference, and you have to decide what kind of difference you want to make.
author: Jane Goodall

quote: You are confined only by the walls you build yourself.
author: Andrew Murphy

quote: For every minute you remain angry, you give up sixty seconds of peace of mind.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Your relationship with yourself sets the tone for every other relationship you have.
author: Robert Holden

quote: Stop being afraid of what could go wrong and start being positive about what could go right.
author: Unknown

quote: There is no passion to be found playing small, in settling for a life that is less than the one you are capable of living.
author: Nelson Mandela

quote: Never say never because limits, like fears, are often just an illusion.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: If we did all the things we are capable of, we would literally astound ourselves.
author: Thomas Edison

quote: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
author: Sean Patrick Flanery

quote: You can't use up creativity. The more you use, the more you have.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
author: William James

quote: Success isn't about how your life looks to others. It's about how it feels to you.
author: Michelle Obama

quote: Fall in love with the process and the results will follow.
author: Bradley Whitford

quote: If you set your goals ridiculously high and it's a failure, you will fail above everyone else's success.
author: James Cameron

quote: Don't allow your rituals to become ruts.
author: Todd Henry

quote: A strong, positive self-image is the best possible preparation for success.
author: Joyce Brothers

quote: If you fear failure, you will never go anywhere.
author: Unknown

quote: Do not wish for an easy life. Wish for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: Be a practical dreamer, backed by action.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: Balance is not something you find, it's something you create.
author: Jana Kingsford

quote: You have power over your mind — not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Creativity is intelligence having fun.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: There is nothing like a dream to create the future.
author: Victor Hugo

quote: Good judgement comes from experience, and a lot of that comes from bad judgement.
author: Will Rogers

quote: Be brave. Take risks. Nothing can substitute experience.
author: Paulo Coelho

quote: Simple can be harder than complex. You have to work hard to get your thinking clean to make it simple. But it's worth it in the end, because once you get there you can move mountains.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: The cure to boredom is curiosity. There is no cure for curiosity.
author: Dorothy Parker

quote: Everything that irritates us about others can lead us to an understanding of ourselves.
author: Carl Jung

quote: Whatever you're meant to do, do it now. The conditions are always impossible.
author: Doris Lessing

quote: If you don't prioritize your life, someone else will.
author: Greg McKeown

quote: Always do your best. What you plant now, you will harvest later.
author: Og Mandino

quote: First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.
author: Epictetus

quote: Forgive yourself for your faults and your mistakes and move on.
author: Les Brown

quote: The struggle ends when the gratitude begins.
author: Neale Donald Walsch

quote: More people would learn from their mistakes if they weren't so busy denying them.
author: Harold J. Smith

quote: Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quote: As long as you live, keep learning how to live.
author: Seneca

quote: You will get all you want in life if you help enough other people get what they want.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: Optimism is a happiness magnet. If you stay positive, good things and good people will be drawn to you.
author: Mary Lou Retton

quote: It's not what you look at that matters, it's what you see.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: One's destination is never a place but rather a new way of looking at things.
author: Henry Miller

quote: What you do matters, but why you do it matters much more.
author: Unknown

quote: Courage is like a muscle. We strengthen it by use.
author: Ruth Gordon

quote: A hero is one who knows how to hang on for one minute longer.
author: Norwegian Proverb

quote: Your mind is a powerful thing. When you fill it with positive thoughts, your life will start to change.
author: Unknown

quote: If people aren't laughing at your dreams, your dreams aren't big enough.
author: Grayson Marshall

quote: There are two ways of spreading light: to be the candle or the mirror that reflects it.
author: Edith Wharton

quote: It's not about how hard you can hit, it's about how hard you can get hit and keep moving forward.
author: Rocky Balboa

quote: I can accept failure. Everyone fails at something. But I can't accept not trying.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: Never be limited by other people's limited imaginations.
author: Mae Jemison

quote: You don't have to see the whole staircase. Just take the first step.
author: Martin Luther King

quote: A positive attitude causes a chain reaction of positive thoughts, events, and outcomes.
author: Wade Boggs

quote: Tomorrow becomes never. No matter how small the task, take the first step now.
author: Tim Ferriss

quote: Fall seven times, stand up eight.
author: Proverb

quote: The bigger the dream, the more important the team.
author: Robin Sharma

quote: There is no such thing as failure, just lessons to be learnt on the way.
author: Sadhguru

quote: Striving for excellence motivates you; striving for perfection is demoralizing.
author: Harriet Braiker

quote: Kind words can be short and easy to speak, but their echoes are truly endless.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: Forgiveness is a gift you give yourself.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: If you want to be happy, set a goal that commands your thoughts, liberates your energy, and inspires your hopes.
author: Andrew Carnegie

quote: Magic is believing in yourself, if you can do that, you can make anything happen.
author: Johann Wolfgang Von Goethe

quote: Don't let the noise of others' opinions drown out your own inner voice. Have the courage to follow your own heart and intuition.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: Do what you feel in your heart to be right. You'll be criticized anyway.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Believe in your infinite potential. Your only limitations are those you set upon yourself.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: Don't let yesterday take up too much of today.
author: Will Rogers

quote: Why fit in when you were born to stand out?
author: Dr. Seuss

quote: Don't give up trying to do what you really want to do.
author: Ella Fitzgerald

quote: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: If you hear a voice within you say you cannot paint, then by all means paint and that voice will be silenced.
author: Vincent Van Gogh

quote: Never dull your shine for somebody else.
author: Tyra Banks

quote: The longer we dwell on our misfortunes, the greater is their power to harm us.
author: Voltaire

quote: If you don't like where you are, change it. You're not a tree.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: Attitude is a choice. Think positive thoughts daily. Believe in yourself.
author: Pat Summitt

quote: Develop success from failures. Discouragement and failure are two of the surest stepping stones to success.
author: Dale Carnegie

quote: Don't be afraid to fail. Be afraid not to try.
author: Michael Jordan

quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
author: Theodore Roosevelt

quote: Try the impossible to show that it can be done.
author: Terry Fox

quote: Don't let the success of others discourage you. Let it inspire you.
author: Unknown

quote: Do more of what makes you happy.
author: Carmel McConnell

quote: A goal without a plan is only a wish.
author: Antoine de Saint-Exupery

quote: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: Go forth and make awesomeness.
author: Unknown

quote: You can't do it unless you imagine it.
author: George Lucas

quote: Tough times never last, but tough people do.
author: Robert H. Schuller

quote: Everybody comes to a point in their life when they want to quit, but it's what you do at that moment that determines who you are.
author: David Goggins

quote: Define success on your own terms, achieve it by your own rules, and build a life you're proud to live.
author: Anne Sweeney

quote: Decide whether or not the goal is worth the risks involved. If it is, stop worrying.
author: Amelia Earhart

quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
author: Chinese Proverb

quote: The best way out is always through.
author: Robert Frost

quote: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
author: Stephen Covey

quote: Your goals are the road maps that guide you and show you what is possible for your life.
author: Les Brown

quote: The beginning is always today.
author: Mary Wollstonecraft

quote: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again, this time more intelligently.
author: Henry Ford

quote: It's easier to keep up than to catch up.
author: Gretchen Rubin

quote: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
author: Charlie Chaplin

quote: When the whole world is silent, even one voice becomes powerful.
author: Malala Yousafzai

quote: Patience and perseverance have a magical effect before which difficulties disappear and obstacles vanish.
author: John Quincy Adams

quote: What makes you different or weird — that's your strength.
author: Meryl Streep

quote: Turn your obstacles into opportunities and your problems into possibilities.
author: Roy T. Bennett

quote: If you are working on something that really excites you, you don't have to be pushed. The vision pulls you.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: It is not the load that breaks you down. It's the way you carry it.
author: Lou Holtz

quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
author: Arthur Ashe

quote: Remember that failure is an event, not a person.
author: Zig Ziglar

quote: In any given moment we have two options: to step forward into growth or back into safety.
author: Abraham Maslow

quote: Everyone you will ever meet knows something you don't.
author: Bill Nye

quote: It takes as much energy to wish as it does to plan.
author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quote: The secret to your success is found in your daily routine.
author: John C. Maxwell

quote: Don't be pushed by your problems. Be led by your dreams.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quote: You are stronger than your challenges and your challenges are making you stronger.
author: Karen Salmansohn

quote: If you don't like something, change it. If you can't change it, change your attitude. Don't complain.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you have imagined.
author: Henry David Thoreau

quote: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: Keep moving forward. One step at a time.
author: Unknown

quote: Nothing can dim the light which shines from within.
author: Maya Angelou

quote: The greatest discovery of all time is that a person can change their future by merely changing their attitude.
author: Oprah Winfrey

quote: Today's accomplishments were yesterday's impossibilities.
author: Robert Schuller

quote: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you are right.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Everything around you that you call life was made up by people, and you can change it.
author: Steve Jobs

quote: I am strong because I've been weak. I am fearless because I've been afraid. I am wise because I've been foolish.
author: Unknown

quote: Make your faith larger than your fears and your dreams larger than your doubts.
author: Robin Sharma

quote: Failure is success if we learn from it.
author: Malcolm Forbes

quote: The best way to not feel hopeless is to get up and do something.
author: Barack Obama

quote: Our greatest weapon against stress is our ability to choose one thought over another.
author: William James

quote: There is no person living who isn't capable of doing more than they think they can do.
author: Henry Ford

quote: Your value doesn't decrease based on someone's inability to see your worth.
author: Unknown

quote: You never know how strong you are until being strong is the only choice you have.
author: Unknown

quote: Use what talents you possess; the woods would be very silent if no birds sang there except those that sang best.
author: Henry Van Dyke

quote: Outer order contributes to inner calm.
author: Gretchen Rubin

quote: Each day wake up and ask yourself what will make you feel most alive that day.
author: Unknown

quote: Your dreams can take you much higher and much farther than anyone ever thought possible.
author: Buzz Aldrin

quote: Ask how something can be done rather than say it can't be done.
author: Bo Bennett

quote: Since you make evil or good by your own thoughts, it is your ruling of your thoughts which proves to be your principal concern.
author: William James

quote: Never doubt that you are valuable and powerful and deserving of every chance in the world to pursue your dreams.
author: Hillary Clinton

quote: When you double your rate of failure you double your rate of success.
author: James Swanwick

quote: If we wait for the moment when everything, absolutely everything is ready, we shall never begin.
author: Ivan Turgenev

quote: Failure is simply the opportunity to begin again, this time more intelligently.
author: Henry Ford

quote: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
author: Charlie Chaplin

quote: Never waste a minute thinking about people you don't like.
author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quote: It's easier to ask forgiveness than ask permission.
author: Grace Hopper

quote: Always focus on how far you've come, not how far you have to go.
author: Anonymous

quote: Art washes away from the soul the dust of everyday life.
author: Pablo Picasso

quote: Make the rest of your life the best of your life.
author: Dr. Eric Thomas

quote: The problem is not the problem. The problem is your attitude about the problem.
author: Captain Jack Sparrow

quote: Give yourself permission to slow down. You can speed up by slowing down.
author: Gabby Bernstein

quote: Divide each difficulty into as many parts as is feasible and necessary to resolve it.
author: Rene Descartes

quote: Be gentle first with yourself if you wish to be gentle with others.
author: Lama Yeshe

quote: There are always limits, and there are always opportunities. The ones we rehearse and focus on are the ones that shape our attitude and our actions.
author: Seth Godin

quote: We are all faced with a series of great opportunities brilliantly disguised as impossible situations.
author: Charles Swindoll

quote: Some people come into your life as blessings. Other people come into your life as lessons.
author: Mother Teresa

quote: We won't be distracted by comparison if we are captivated with purpose.
author: Bob Goff

quote: Do not seek to follow in the footsteps of others, instead, seek what they sought.
author: Matsuo Basho

quote: The world is moving so fast that the person who says it can't be done is generally interrupted by someone doing it.
author: Elbert Hubbard

quote: If you tell yourself you can't, you won't.
author: Dean Graziosi

quote: Be a prisoner of the past or a pioneer of the future. The choice is yours.
author: Deepak Chopra

quote: Incredible things can be done simply if we are committed to making them happen.
author: Sadhguru
